title: rhododendron yelliottii
intro: Rhododendron yelliottii, also known as the Yell's rhododendron, is a rare species of flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Rhododendron yelliottii include its ability to support immune function, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant was prepared as a tea or a tincture, and it was also used in poultices to apply directly to the skin for its medicinal benefits.
